title: Fabric base
description: A clean foundation for building Fabric modpacks.
body:
A clean foundation for building Fabric modpacks.

**FabricBase is a lightweight, performance-oriented Fabric modpack designed as a template for creating your own modpacks.
It includes essential optimization, configuration, and compatibility mods — providing a stable starting point for builders, developers, and players who want to expand on a reliable foundation.**

## ✨ Features

- Optimized Performance: Includes Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and Krypton for a smooth experience.

- Quality of Life Tools: Mod Menu, Jade, Mouse Tweaks, BetterF3, and more.

- Compatibility-Ready: Comes with Fabric API, Architectury, and Cloth Config preinstalled.

- Easily Extendable: Add your own mods, tweak configs, or build a themed pack on top.

- Lightweight & Clean: No gameplay changes — only the essentials.

Ideal for Modpack creators who want a ready-to-use Fabric setup and for developers testing new mods in a stable environment.

**For players who want a clean, optimized Fabric experience**
